tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 2 -type d \\( -name staged -o -name .staging -o -name tmp -o -name temp \\) -print -exec chmod 700 {} +; chmod 700 /usr/src/app 2>/dev/null; getfacl -p /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true; stat -c '%A %a %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null || true"}
